title: vatica lobata
intro: Vatica lobata, also known as the Borneo ironwood or ironwood tree, is a species of plant that belongs to the family Dipterocarpaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its bark, which contains a high concentration of tannins and flavonoids, and has been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Vatica lobata include its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which can help to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and support the immune system. Vatica lobata is commonly prepared as a decoction or infusion, and is also used in traditional medicine to treat conditions such as diarrhea, dysentery, and skin infections.
